title: hemionitis × iberica
intro: Hemionitis × iberica, also known as Iberian lady fern, is a hybrid fern species that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Hemionitis × iberica include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried powder for use in herbal supplements and traditional medicine practices.
